The encoded condition only checks minority status, omitting the gender requirement of the clause.

csspremsobcsi.reason: Accurately captures the income threshold clause.
Correctly enforces the OBC eligibility requirement.

Matches clause limiting total income to ₹8,00,000.

Accurately captures the upper age bound of the clause.

igndps.reason: Enforces lower age bound; combined with upper bound rule covers full clause.
Enforces upper age bound; combined with lower bound rule covers full clause.

has_bpl_card directly indicates BPL status per government criteria.

ignwps.reason: Marital status field correctly captures widow requirement.
Gender field correctly enforces the pension’s target of women who lost their husband.
Age >= 40 matches the lower bound of the 40‑79 age group.
Age <= 79 matches the upper bound of the 40‑79 age group.
has_bpl_card field correctly represents below‑poverty‑line status.

mssc.reason: The condition gender eq 'female' correctly captures the clause that the scheme is only for women and girl children.

nfbs.reason: The field bereavement_event correctly captures the requirement that the primary breadwinner has died, matching the clause.

nmmss.reason: Accurately captures the requirement that the applicant must be a student.

Accurately captures the requirement to hold a bank account.

nsap-ignoaps.reason: The encoded condition uses the age field with a gte 60 comparison, matching the clause.
The encoded condition checks has_bpl_card true, which correctly represents belonging to a BPL household.

pm-kisan.reason: The field is_farmer_with_land correctly captures the clause that only families owning cultivable land in their own name are eligible.
pays_income_tax indicates payment of income tax, matching the clause that such persons are disqualified.
family_member_in_govt_service correctly represents the clause that any family member in a government ministry/office is disqualified; the broader encoding is acknowledged as a simplification.
receives_govt_pension_over_10k captures the clause that pensioners with monthly pension above Rs 10,000 are disqualified; the exact 10,000 case is a known simplification.
holds_constitutional_or_political_post correctly models the disqualification of families with members holding constitutional or elected posts.
is_practicing_registered_professional accurately represents the disqualification of registered professionals such as doctors, engineers, lawyers, etc.

pm-svanidhi.reason: The rule does not enforce the urban area requirement; it allows any street vendor regardless of location.
The rule only checks for a certificate or LoR, missing the clause that vendors identified in the survey but not yet issued a certificate are also eligible.

pm-sym.reason: Only lower age bound encoded, upper bound missing.
Only upper age bound encoded, lower bound missing.
Accurately encodes monthly income limit via annual income.

pmay-g.reason: The rule requires area eq 'rural', but the clause also includes houseless households regardless of area, so urban houseless households would be incorrectly denied.
The rule requires kutcha houses, whereas the clause explicitly excludes households living in kutcha houses.
Accurately captures the automatic exclusion of motorised vehicle owners.
Accurately captures the automatic exclusion of households with income tax payers.
Accurately captures the automatic exclusion of households with a government employee.

pmegp.reason: Accurately captures the age requirement of being above 18 years.

pmfby.reason: The field cultivates_crops correctly represents the requirement that the applicant is a cultivator or sharecropper on the insured land.
The field has_land_ownership_or_tenure_docs accurately captures possession of a valid land ownership certificate or tenancy agreement.

pmjdy.reason: The clause specifies a conditional requirement for minors above ten years needing guardian support, not a blanket age requirement; the rule incorrectly requires age >=10 for all, granting eligibility to adults.

pmjjby.reason: Matches lower age bound of official clause.

pms-sc.reason: Field binding and operator correctly capture SC eligibility.

pmsby.reason: Matches clause: requires bank account holder.

pmuy.reason: Encodes gender requirement; other clauses handled by other rules.

pmv.reason: Field is_vishwakarma_trade_artisan correctly captures the requirement of being a self‑employed artisan in one of the 18 trades.

The is_post_matric_student field captures the requirement to pursue a post‑matric qualification, matching the clause.

post-st.reason: The rule only checks caste category but ignores state-specific ST designation and the education requirement of matriculation or higher.

pre-dis.reason: Field only indicates studying, not class IX/X or full-time status.
Field lacks requirement for valid disability certificate.

pre-sc.reason: The field is_student only indicates that the applicant is studying, but the clause requires that the applicant pursue studies in India, which is not captured by the field.
